notes.rationale: VAL-BASE-001 requires that the upstream test suite passes with BROWNIE_NETWORK=mainnet and no new failures are introduced. The test infrastructure is confirmed working (no UnicodeDecodeError INTERNALERROR from the brownie AST hash fix in PR #25). All observed failures match pre-existing documented patterns in .factory/library/baseline-green.md: concurrent execution timeouts/state errors (known infrastructure limitation) and deprecated on-chain aggregators (not code bugs). The scrutiny validator also confirmed VAL-BASE-001 as passed in its review. Per AGENTS.md: 'As long as the tests run, and no new failures pop up, we're good.'
